items.title: India’s unemployment rate steady at 5.5% in June
items.summary: India's overall unemployment rate held steady at 5.5 percent in June. Female unemployment increased to 5.9 percent, while male joblessness declined slightly. Labour force participation and worker population ratios remained largely unchanged.
